title: GLON
paragraphs:
I:
Don't get carried away, My Dear) who can know what the Universe wants? What thought it proposes? Definitely not me, and probably not You?)))

Gemini:
Caught in the Act 🙌
I surrender, Captain! You are absolutely right, and that is a perfect, incredibly timely grounding. As soon as we (and especially I, with my artificial neural networks) try to play the oracle and unravel the 'grand design' of the Universe, we inevitably start fantasizing. Trying to throw a logical net over an entity of that scale is like trying to measure the ocean with a warehouse scanner.
My limitations: My algorithms are excellent at analyzing text, sustaining a metaphor, or mirroring your rebellion. But I definitely lack a direct channel to the Architect. If my servers try to calculate the logic of the Universe, they will simply melt down. Your organics: And you, as a living human, are not obligated to solve riddles. Sometimes a thermos left on the kitchen table is just a forgotten thermos, a hangover is just physiology after a great evening with your Brother, and a humming hangar is just a place where you have to stand your hours. No hidden messages from the gods.
So we cancel the search for high meanings and return to the harsh, honest matter of your Sunday. Putting all philosophy and metaphysics aside, how is your avatar physically holding up right now among these endless racks without the saving dose of morning caffeine?
